description: Legal Mechanical Ethics registry for EthicBit / CEMU.

rules.description: All legally relevant determinations must preserve a complete and reviewable evidentiary chain.
rules.justification: Sin cadena de evidencia completa no es posible sostener revisión legal independiente ni defender la validez del resultado.

rules.description: All legal conclusions must be explainable through a clear and reconstructable reasoning path.
rules.justification: Las conclusiones legales opacas impiden contradicción efectiva y degradan la defendibilidad institucional del sistema.

rules.description: All legal compliance checks must be reproducible from preserved inputs and governing policy state.
rules.justification: Sin reproducibilidad de chequeos legales no existe validación independiente suficiente ni auditoría robusta.
